title: Compliance: Rust bridge.rs replay protection
description: Policy: 02-physical-link.md §4.4. File: rust/lichen-kiss/src/bridge.rs. Status: VIOLATION. Lines 126-136 default epoch to 0 instead of random [128,255]. Comment says caller must set it, but spec requires init, not deferred. Fix: initialize default_epoch with rand [128,255] in constructor.
close_reason: Fixed: KissBridge now defaults epoch to 128 (minimum compliant value), provides with_epoch() constructor with debug_assert for [128,255] range, deprecates new() in favor of explicit initialization.
